creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks! 

Several notes: 
- please next time submit unified diff between old and new port instead of full 
tarball; 
- pipe port through portlint(1) to find subtle inconsistencies (blank line between 
LIB_ and RUN_DEPENDS and extra blank line at the end of pkg-plist in this case), 

Anyway, thank you!
